description: You are a VLBI Telescope Scheduler. Configure Stellarium for the ALMA Observatory (-23.019°, -67.753°, 5058m) during the EHT observation window on April 10, 2017, at 08:00 UTC. The simulation must reflect radio astronomy conditions: atmosphere and landscape disabled, and the azimuthal coordinate grid enabled. Locate and center the view on Sagittarius A* (or Alnasl/Gamma Sagittarii if the primary target is unavailable). Save a screenshot of the centered target to ~/Pictures/stellarium/ and generate a scheduling verification report at ~/Desktop/eht_alma_schedule.txt. The report must include the observatory name (ALMA), the date (April 10, 2017), the target name, and a confirmation of whether the target is above the horizon. Ensure the session configuration is saved to config.ini.
